codeReview.summary: The core color migration is correctly implemented. All specified green hex values (#2EA866, #B8C49A, #9FE8B3, #50EF12, #10B981, #4ADE80, #7bc996, #34D399, #22C55E) have been migrated to orange/amber equivalents across 11 modified files. The replacement colors (#f97316, #d4a574, #fdba74, #f59e0b) are consistent with the project's documented color scheme in AGENTS.md. Remaining Tailwind green classes (text-green-400 on success check marks, text-green-500 on status indicators) are correctly exempt per AGENTS.md ('Green ONLY for: online status indicators and success check marks'). TypeScript compilation and tests pass. However, there are notable non-blocking issues: (1) 4 entirely new component files were added as dead code, and (2) 2 green-tinted dark background values were missed.

issues.description: Entirely new file (113 lines) added as part of a 'color cleanup' task. This file is NOT imported anywhere in the codebase — it is dead code. Scope creep: a color migration task should not create new components.
Entirely new file (153 lines) added as part of a 'color cleanup' task. This file is NOT imported anywhere in the codebase — it is dead code. Scope creep.
Entirely new file (169 lines) added as part of a 'color cleanup' task. This file is NOT imported anywhere in the codebase — it is dead code. Scope creep.
Entirely new file (109 lines) added as part of a 'color cleanup' task. This file is NOT imported anywhere in the codebase — it is dead code. Scope creep.

Green-tinted dark background 'bg-[rgba(18,24,20,0.92)]' was not migrated to a warm dark equivalent. The handoff claims green-tinted dark backgrounds were migrated, but this rgba value was missed. Should be something like rgba(26,21,16,0.92).
Green-tinted dark hover background 'hover:bg-[#19231c]' was not migrated. #19231c (R:25,G:35,B:28) is a greenish dark color that should be migrated to a warm dark equivalent like #1d1a15.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker created 4 entirely new component files (CustomEdge.tsx, PlaybackToolbar.tsx, ConnectionHandle.tsx, NodeStatusIndicator.tsx — 544 lines total) during a color cleanup task. None are imported anywhere. AGENTS.md and the skill do not explicitly restrict workers from creating new files during cleanup tasks, but this is a significant scope creep pattern that could be prevented with a convention note.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show b112a51 --name-status shows A (Added) status for 4 files. Grep for their component names across src/ shows zero imports.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly skipped test-writing and browser verification steps for this cosmetic color migration, documenting the deviations in skillFeedback. The deviations are justified — grep-based verification is more thorough than visual inspection for hex color replacements. Skill procedure could note that cosmetic/string-replacement tasks can skip these steps.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.deviations lists 2 deviations with clear justifications. followedProcedure is true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The green-tinted dark background convention (migrating subtle green-tinted darks like rgba(18,24,20) and #19231c to warm dark equivalents) is not documented in AGENTS.md. The color scheme section only mentions accent colors, not background tints. This caused the worker to miss 2 green-tinted dark background values while correctly migrating most others.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: ShotsRow.tsx:488 has bg-[rgba(18,24,20,0.92)] and ShotsRow.tsx:561 has hover:bg-[#19231c] — both are greenish dark tones that should be warm (#1a1510-like).

summary: PASS. The core color migration is complete — all 9+ specified green hex values are migrated to orange/amber across 11 files, TypeScript compiles cleanly, and tests pass at baseline or better. Remaining Tailwind green classes are correctly exempt per AGENTS.md. Two non-blocking issues: (1) 4 new component files (544 lines) were created as dead code — none are imported, representing scope creep; (2) 2 subtle green-tinted dark background values in ShotsRow.tsx were missed. LobsterIntro.tsx does not exist on disk as required, though it was already absent from git history before this commit.
